reason: Glob pattern support and input/output redirection are fully implemented but still listed under 'Future Enhancements' in ARCHITECTURE.md. This causes architecture gap score to remain at 85% and confuses team on what's actually built. Implementation is ahead of documented spec.
proposedChange: 1. Move 'Glob pattern support (*, ?, [])' from 'Future Enhancements' to a new 'Implemented Features' subsection or integrate into existing sections (path resolution, command pattern). Document matchGlob/expandGlob/expandPathArgs. 2. Move 'Redirection (>, >>, <)' from 'Future Enhancements' to documented feature with description of how exec() handles > and >> output redirection and < input redirection. 3. Update 'Extension Points' section to note that glob expansion happens automatically in path args before command execution.
